markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Alex's new positioning, target audience, and SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Positioning:** Alex is rebranding from an "AI Interviewer" to an "Agentic Recruiting Platform," a system of four specialized AI agents (Interview, Connect, Discover, Verify).](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Target Audience:** The primary focus is mid-market staffing firms (10+ recruiters in US/CA/UK), as they have a clear, measurable ROI from Alex's 24/7 candidate outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** To build trust, comparison articles will now be more balanced, positioning Alex as an integration partner (e.g., with Greenhouse) rather than a direct competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [**Technical SEO:** Critical fixes are needed for 404 errors (via 301 redirects) and broken links to improve site health and search engine ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

## Topics

### Target Audience & Product-Market Fit (PMF)

  - [**Primary Audience:** Mid-market staffing firms (10+ recruiters in US/CA/UK).](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Rationale:** They have a clear, measurable ROI from Alex's 24/7 candidate outreach, which directly increases placements and revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [**Exclusion:** Firms with outsourced recruiters (e.g., India-based) are not a good fit, as the ROI is less pronounced.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [**Secondary Audience:** Large enterprise customers.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [**Challenge:** PMF is not yet established. Enterprise buyers focus on metrics like time-to-hire, not revenue, and require social proof ("who else is using this?").](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [**Status:** A few deals are in the pipeline that could provide the needed social proof.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### New Positioning: "Agentic Recruiting Platform"

  - [Alex is rebranding from an "AI Interviewer" to an "Agentic Recruiting Platform" built from four specialized AI agents.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [New landing pages are in development for each agent:](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Interview Agent:** 24/7 screening and scheduling.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [**Connect Agent:** ATS integration and admin coordination.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [**Discover Agent:** Natural language candidate search within the ATS.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [**Verify Agent:** Detects cheating, resume/LinkedIn mismatches, and location spoofing.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)

### Content & SEO Strategy

  - [**Landing Page SEO:** GrowthX will optimize the new agent landing pages with commercial keywords to drive conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [**Comparison Article Strategy:** To build trust, comparison articles will be more balanced.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [**New Approach:** Position Alex as an integration partner (e.g., with Greenhouse) rather than a direct competitor in lists where it's not a like-for-like product.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
      - [**November:** 2 more posts to publish to reach the 20-post goal.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
      - [**December:** 5 posts ready for review; 7 more in production.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
      - [**Refresh:** The "Best AI Recruiting Tools" listicle will be expanded with more detailed feature descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [**Branding:**](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
      - [**Logo:** The Alex logo has been updated.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
      - [**Images:** GrowthX will update all blog post images with the new logo and color palette.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)

### Technical SEO & Conversion Tracking

  - [**Conversion Tracking:** A new `/thank-you` page is live, but the corresponding conversion event is not yet configured in Google Tag Manager (GTM).](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This setup is required to send accurate conversion data to Google Analytics (GA4) and the GrowthX dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [**Site Audit Fixes:**](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
      - [**404 Errors:** Implement 301 redirects for broken URLs identified in the audit.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Broken Links:** Use the "Broken Link Checker" plugin to find and fix internal links pointing to 404 pages.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Donald:**](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
      - [Grant GrowthX access to the new agent landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [Configure the `/thank-you` page conversion event in GTM.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [Implement the 301 redirects for 404 pages.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Fix broken internal links using the "Broken Link Checker" plugin.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [Optimize the new agent landing pages with commercial keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [Adjust the strategy for comparison articles to position Alex as an integration partner.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
      - [Update all blog post images with the new Alex logo and color palette.](https://fathom.video/share/WxjVN_SFsG6BLeGzaVmjdzMnMJRsfr8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
